node.label: Autoregressive / next-step prediction
node.definition: A joint distribution is factorized into a sequence of conditional next-step predictions.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Autoregressive / next-step prediction is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling and feeding downstream nodes such as Autoregressive decoding, Recurrent neural networks, Decoder-only causal transformers.

limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling.
